name: cp-runner
description: A blazing-fast Competitive Programming test case runner for VS Code.

commands.title: CP Runner: Clear All Test Cases

cp-runner.execution.timeLimit.description: Execution time limit per test case in milliseconds.

cp-runner.compiler.cppFlags.description: Compiler flags used when compiling C++ files.

cp-runner.compiler.cFlags.description: Compiler flags used when compiling C files.

cp-runner.compiler.javaFlags.description: Compiler flags used when compiling Java files (javac).

cp-runner.diff.ignoreTrailingWhitespace.description: Ignore trailing whitespace differences in actual vs expected outputs.

cp-runner.diff.ignoreSystemLineEndings.description: Normalize and ignore system line-endings (e.g. \r\n vs \n).

cp-runner.diff.floatTolerance.description: Enable Float Precision Tolerance when comparing numeric/float answers.

cp-runner.concurrency.maxWorkers.description: Maximum number of concurrent execution threads/workers running test cases.

cp-runner.execution.autoRun.description: Automatically run all test cases whenever the active source file is saved.

cp-runner.execution.autoRunKeybinding.description: Display hint for the auto-run keyboard shortcut shown in the UI panel.

cp-runner.execution.autoSave.description: Automatically save the active source code file before running tests.

cp-runner.execution.autoClearConsole.description: Automatically clear all test case outputs before starting a new run.

cp-runner.compiler.cppCommand.description: C++ compiler command / path (e.g. g++, clang++, g++-12). WARNING: This command is executed directly by the system; ensure it only points to trusted executables to avoid arbitrary code execution.

cp-runner.compiler.cCommand.description: C compiler command / path (e.g. gcc, clang, gcc-12). WARNING: This command is executed directly by the system; ensure it only points to trusted executables.

cp-runner.compiler.javaCommand.description: Java runtime command / path (e.g. java, java-17). WARNING: This command is executed directly by the system; ensure it only points to trusted executables.

cp-runner.compiler.pythonCommand.description: Python interpreter command (e.g. python3, python, py). WARNING: This command is executed directly by the system; ensure it only points to trusted executables.

cp-runner.defaultLanguageExtension.description: Default file extension for newly created problems parsed from Competitive Companion.

cp-runner.execution.focusOnFileOpen.description: Automatically focus the CP Runner panel when you open a file that has test cases assigned to it.

cp-runner.ui.fontSize.description: Font size (px) for input/output textareas in the CP Runner panel.

scripts.compile:prod: tsc --noEmit && npx tailwindcss -i src/webview/input.css -o out/webview/styles.css --minify && esbuild src/webview/index.tsx --bundle --minify --outfile=out/webview/index.js && esbuild src/extension.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:vscode --outfile=out/extension.js --minify
scripts.compile: tsc --noEmit && npx tailwindcss -i src/webview/input.css -o out/webview/styles.css && esbuild src/webview/index.tsx --bundle --outfile=out/webview/index.js && esbuild src/extension.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:vscode --outfile=out/extension.js
scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
